workLog.action: Read candidates file and confirmed branch context. Issue #1744 (priority:P2, area-prompts, area-workflows, owner:Charmine, assignee rjmurillo-bot) selected by wrapper-created branch feat/1744-autonomous. Confirmed no existing PR for #1744 via gh pr list search (only #1775 references the sibling issue #1746).
workLog.outcome: Issue body specifies: cherry-pick four sections from agent-rules-books/unified-software-engineering.md (Primary Directive, Conflict Resolution Rules, Default Work Workflow, Forbidden Patterns); do NOT copy the full 46KB; adapt formatting to match existing .claude/rules/ conventions; add alwaysApply if convention used.

workLog.action: Identified upstream source repo path. The agent-rules-books repo organizes per-book rules under <book>/claude/.claude/rules/<book>.md. Fetched https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ciembor/agent-rules-books/main/unified-software-engineering/claude/.claude/rules/unified-software-engineering.md (45998 bytes, 1023 lines).
workLog.outcome: Located the four required sections via grep on H2 markers: Primary Directive (line 24), Conflict Resolution Rules (line 41), Default Work Workflow (line 86), Forbidden Patterns (line 880).

workLog.action: Reviewed existing .claude/rules/enterprise-patterns.md (added by PR #1762 for issue #1753) to match frontmatter and prose conventions: description + alwaysApply: false, H1 title, intro paragraphs, H2/H3 sections, dash list markers.
workLog.outcome: Adopted the same frontmatter shape. Set alwaysApply: false to match the prior rule and to keep this rule loaded contextually rather than always; the Relationship to Other Rules section explicitly documents tiebreaker semantics.

workLog.action: Composed .claude/rules/unified-software-engineering.md. Cherry-picked the four required sections verbatim from the upstream document. Added a short intro that states the upstream provenance, the MIT license, and the explicit reason for not importing the full file (rule budget, model already knows constituent rules). Added a Relationship to Other Rules section that pins the tiebreaker semantics relative to enterprise-patterns and any future book-specific rule.
workLog.outcome: 7848 bytes / 152 lines. Above the issue's ~3-4KB hint because the issue also requires the full Forbidden Patterns blocklist verbatim and that section alone is ~2.4KB.

workLog.action: Validated by running `npx markdownlint-cli2 .claude/rules/unified-software-engineering.md` and filtering output for the new file path.
workLog.outcome: Zero errors on the new file. Pre-existing repo-wide lint errors in unrelated files (orchestrator.md, spec-generator.md, etc.) are out of scope per AGENTS.md scoped-lint guidance.

workLog.action: Committed feat(rules) and session log. Pushed feat/1744-autonomous and opened a PR with Fixes #1744. Enabled auto-merge so the PR merges once required checks pass.
workLog.outcome: PR URL recorded in prUrl below. No remaining blockers.

nextSteps: Auto-merge will land the rule once required checks pass.
